terrain_tile_scheme: source FABDEM tile id, emitted as <terrain_tile_id>.cog.tif
building_partition_scheme: source Overture partition id, emitted as <building_partition_id>.geoparquet

license_and_attribution.FABDEM: Retain FABDEM license and attribution from the source distribution.
license_and_attribution.Overture Maps Buildings: Retain Overture Maps license and attribution from the source release.
license_and_attribution.EGM2008: Retain GeographicLib and EGM2008 model attribution.
